comment: Hand-labeled material corrections, applied AFTER auto-classification. The drawing cannot distinguish glass from drywall (both are thin lines), so regions known from walking the floor are re-labeled here. Each override re-labels ONLY the material ids listed in applies_to inside its region, so rough boxes are safe: air and furniture are untouched unless listed. Coordinates are image pixels, y down. rect_px = [x0, y0, x1, y1]; polygon_px = [[x, y], ...] also supported.

overrides.label: lunch room enclosure (center of floor) - ROUGH BOX, adjust to the real extent
